TileType.notes: T01-T08 were already in TILE_TYPE_MAP; T09-T20 mapping entries added to LevelLoader.ts

SpecialBlockType.notes: BOMB, WINDMILL, LIGHT, WAVE all have behavior classes in SpecialBlock.ts, SFX in GameScene.ts, and factory coverage with exhaustive switch

fixes_applied.fix: Created new file as main game scene controller; wires TileGrid.tilesMatched → tile-disappear.anim; ComboTracker.comboChanged → GameHUD; GameSession.SESSION_ENDED → LevelCompletePopup.show(); GameSession.SESSION_FAILED → failure handling; tryMatch() calls TILE_CONNECT + TILE_DISAPPEAR SFX; triggerSpecialBlock() calls SPECIAL_* SFX for all 4 SpecialBlockType values; SESSION_ENDED navigates to IslandMapScene
Added AudioManager import and playSFX(SFXKey.AREA_RESTORE) call at stage=4 inside playStage()

Added AudioManager import and playSFX(SFXKey.LIGHTHOUSE_ON) in _triggerLighthouseFinalEffect(); added AreaRestorationEffect.playStage(chapterId, 4) call in _refreshAllChapterStates() when restorationStage===4
Added addCurrency(beachCoins, glowstones) method for proper IAP currency credit; added advanceRestorationStage(chapterId) method to increment restorationStage 0→4

Added AreaRestorationEffect property; added _tryAdvanceRestoration() helper that calls ProgressionManager.advanceRestorationStage() then AreaRestorationEffect.playStage(); fixed _onBackToMap() scene name from 'MapScene' to 'IslandMapScene'
Added shopButton property (@property Button); registered Button.EventType.CLICK → _onShop() which calls director.loadScene('ShopScene'); wired onDestroy cleanup
Added shopButton property; registered Button.EventType.CLICK → _onShop() which calls director.loadScene('ShopScene'); wired onDestroy cleanup — enables GameScene → ShopScene transition
Replaced direct progress.currency mutation with pm.addCurrency() call in both verifyWithBackend success path and sandbox fallback path — uses proper ProgressionManager API
Extended TILE_TYPE_MAP with all 20 TileType entries (tile_09 through tile_20) so all TileType enum values can be loaded from level configs

connections_verified.description: GameScene listens to TileGrid tilesMatched → plays tile-disappear.anim
GameScene listens to ComboTracker comboChanged → GameHUD.init() wired
CurrencyDisplay polls ProgressionManager for currency changes (frame poll)

unresolved.item: LevelCompletePopup._onBackToMap scene name was 'MapScene' (typo); corrected to 'IslandMapScene' — runtime scene asset must also be named 'IslandMapScene' in the Cocos Creator project
WAVE SpecialBlock SFX (SPECIAL_WAVE) added in GameScene.triggerSpecialBlock(); actual trigger call site depends on board input controller invoking GameScene.triggerSpecialBlock() with correct type
TileType T09-T20 mapping added to LevelLoader; level-design.json must use 'tile_09'…'tile_20' string keys to reference them
